reviews.review_title: Useful for practicing aim in VR
reviews.review_description: I like how the game gives you the option to have the crossbar enabled or disabled, since having it disabled adds to the realism. The point values of the targets should be tweaked a bit, though aside from that I liked the game and thought it was helpful for getting used to VR

Its a fun aimtrainer to get used to shooting in VR get into the flow,You can get used to reload mechanics
Global score board would make it fire though,Wanna know what score everyone got
This game has really great reload mechanics and accurate shooting, and it is a lot of fun. I would highly recommend this, especially as it is free!
Game works pretty well. Reloading could use a little bit of polish and some more variety down the line but the game is an excellent shooting range with pin point accuracy.
